info.title: VK API
info.description: VK (formerly VKontakte) is a Russian social network. This API provides access to user data, wall posts, friends, groups, photos, and messages.

get.description: Returns detailed information on users. You can specify up to 1000 user IDs.

parameters.name: user_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of user IDs or screen names. By default, the current user ID is used.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of additional profile fields to return (e.g., photo_50, city, verified, counters).

parameters.name: name_case
parameters.description: Case for declension of user name and surname.

parameters.name: access_token
parameters.description: Access token.

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: API version.

get.description: Returns a list of users matching the search criteria.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query string (e.g., Vasya Babich).

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order: 0 - by popularity, 1 - by registration date.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset needed to return a specific subset of users.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of users to return (max 1000).

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of additional profile fields to return.

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: City ID.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Country ID.

get.description: Returns a list of posts on a user wall or community wall.

parameters.name: owner_id
parameters.description: ID of the user or community. Use a negative value to designate a community ID.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: User or community short address.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset needed to return a specific subset of posts.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of posts to return (max 100).

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter to apply.

parameters.name: extended
parameters.description: 1 to return wall, profiles, and groups fields; 0 otherwise.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of additional fields.

post.description: Adds a new post on a user wall or community wall. Can also be used to publish suggested or scheduled posts.

parameters.name: owner_id
parameters.description: User ID or community ID. Use a negative value to designate a community ID.

parameters.name: friends_only
parameters.description: 1 to post to friends only; 0 for all users.

parameters.name: from_group
parameters.description: 1 to post on behalf of a community.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Post text. Required if attachments is not set.

parameters.name: attachments
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of media attachments (e.g., photo100172_166443618).

parameters.name: publish_date
parameters.description: Publication date (Unix timestamp). If used, post will be scheduled.

parameters.name: lat
parameters.description: Geographical latitude of a check-in.

parameters.name: long
parameters.description: Geographical longitude of a check-in.

get.description: Returns a list of user friend IDs or detailed information about a user's friends.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User ID. By default, the current user ID is used.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort order.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of friends to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset to return a specific subset.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Profile fields to return (e.g., nickname, domain, city).

get.description: Returns a list of the communities to which a user belongs.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User ID.

parameters.name: extended
parameters.description: If set to 1, returns complete information about communities.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Types of communities to return.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Community fields to return.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of communities to return (max 1000).

get.description: Returns information about communities by their IDs.

parameters.name: group_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated IDs or screen names of communities.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: ID or screen name of a single community.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Community fields to return.

get.description: Returns a list of a user's or community's photos.

parameters.name: owner_id
parameters.description: ID of the user or community (negative for community).

parameters.name: album_id
parameters.description: Photo album ID or wall, profile, saved.

parameters.name: photo_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated photo identifiers.

parameters.name: rev
parameters.description: 1 for reverse chronological order.

parameters.name: extended
parameters.description: 1 to return additional likes, comments, tags fields.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of photos to return (max 1000).

get.description: Returns a list of a user's or community's photo albums.

parameters.name: owner_id
parameters.description: ID of the user or community.

parameters.name: album_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated album IDs.

parameters.name: need_system
parameters.description: 1 to return system albums (wall, profile).

parameters.name: need_covers
parameters.description: 1 to return album cover photo.

parameters.name: photo_sizes
parameters.description: 1 to return photo sizes as a special array.

post.description: Sends a message to a user or group chat.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User ID to send the message to.

parameters.name: peer_id
parameters.description: Destination ID: user ID, 2000000000 + chat_id for group chat, or negative community ID.

parameters.name: random_id
parameters.description: Unique ID used to prevent duplicate message sending.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message text. Required if attachment is not set.

parameters.name: attachment
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of attached objects (e.g., photo100172_166443618).

parameters.name: sticker_id
parameters.description: Sticker ID.

parameters.name: lat
parameters.description: Geographical latitude.

parameters.name: long
parameters.description: Geographical longitude.

parameters.name: reply_to
parameters.description: ID of the message to reply to.

get.description: Returns message history for the specified user or group chat.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset to return a specific subset of messages.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of messages to return (max 200).

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User ID for the conversation.

parameters.name: peer_id
parameters.description: Peer ID for the conversation.

parameters.name: start_message_id
parameters.description: Starting message ID.

parameters.name: rev
parameters.description: 1 for chronological order, 0 for reverse.

parameters.name: extended
parameters.description: 1 to return user and community objects in response.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Additional profile fields to return.

get.description: Returns data required to show newsfeed for the current user.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Filters to apply: post, photo, photo_tag, wall_photo, friend, note.

parameters.name: return_banned
parameters.description: 1 to return news items from banned sources.

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Earliest timestamp (Unix) of news items to return.

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Latest timestamp (Unix) of news items to return.

parameters.name: max_photos
parameters.description: Maximum number of photos to return.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of news items to return (max 100).

parameters.name: start_from
parameters.description: Identifier for pagination (from previous response next_from).

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Additional profile fields to return.

post.description: Adds the specified object to the Likes list of the current user.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Object type.

parameters.name: owner_id
parameters.description: ID of the object owner.

parameters.name: item_id
parameters.description: Object ID.

parameters.name: owner_id
parameters.description: ID of the user or community.

parameters.name: videos
parameters.description: Comma-separated video IDs in ownerID_videoID format.

parameters.name: album_id
parameters.description: ID of the album containing videos.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of videos to return (max 200).

parameters.name: extended
parameters.description: 1 to return additional info.

deactivated.description: Returns if a profile is deleted or blocked
